blockers.description: Pulumi has 5 pending 'creating' operations blocking new deployments
blockers.workaround: Run 'pulumi cancel' in infra/ to clear pending ops

blockers.description: vici-app pod crashloops due to Temporal DNS mismatch (fullnameOverride fix committed but not deployed)
blockers.workaround: Run 'pulumi up' after cancel to deploy the fix

human_actions_pending.action: Run 'cd infra && pulumi cancel' to clear 5 pending operations
human_actions_pending.context: Pulumi state has stuck creating ops from timed-out deployment

human_actions_pending.action: Run 'pulumi up' to deploy fullnameOverride fix and unblock ingress creation
human_actions_pending.context: This will recreate Temporal services with correct names, fix app DNS, create Service + Ingress

decisions.decision: Add fullnameOverride: temporal to Helm chart values
decisions.rationale: Helm auto-generates service names with release hash prefix (temporal-5b5cac0f-frontend) but secret expects temporal-frontend

decisions.decision: Export ingress_external_ip from Pulumi for Squarespace DNS setup
decisions.rationale: User needs static IP for A record; DOMAIN-SETUP.md documents full workflow

next_action: 1) Finalize quick task 260405-wjc: create SUMMARY.md, update STATE.md, commit docs. 2) Run 'cd infra && pulumi cancel && pulumi up' to deploy fixes. 3) Verify ingress created and app healthy.
context_notes: Two quick tasks ran this session. 260405-wai (ingress check + domain doc) completed fully. 260405-wjc (Temporal DNS fix) has the code change committed but needs docs finalization and the user must run pulumi cancel/up to deploy. Root cause: Helm chart generated service names with hash prefix but secret expected plain names. Pre-existing uncommitted changes in app.py, certmanager.py, secrets.py from prior work.
